body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices` **Service directory:** `sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/` **Triggered by:** PR #57510 (commit `8ba2ed962`) by @azure-sdk-bot ## What Changed PR #57510 upgraded `Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices` to version 1.6.0-beta.1 targeting the `2026-01-15-preview` API version. This introduced several new resource types to the generated SDK: - `CognitiveServicesAgentApplication` — manages agent applications under a Cognitive Services Project (`Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects/applications`) - `CognitiveServicesAgentDeployment` — manages agent deployments under a Cognitive Services Project - `RaiExternalSafetyProviderSchema` — manages external safety provider schemas for Responsible AI - `RaiToolLabel` — manages RAI tool labels - `RaiTopic` — manages RAI topics - `SubscriptionRaiPolicy` — manages subscription-scoped RAI policies ## Gaps Found - The CHANGELOG entry for `1.6.0-beta.1` only states _"Upgraded api-version to 2026-01-15-preview"_ — it does not enumerate the new resource types or capabilities added by this API version bump - The README **Key concepts** section has no content specific to this package; it just links to generic Azure SDK guidelines — new resource categories (Agent resources, RAI resources) are not described - The README **Examples** section contains no code samples at all, just a link to a generic samples gallery; none of the resource types (including the newly added ones) have usage examples - The `samples/` or `tests/Samples/` directory has no sample files, meaning there are no test-backed snippets to be injected into the README
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Update the CHANGELOG **File:** `sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/CHANGELOG.md` **Action:** Edit — expand the `1.6.0-beta.1` entry to enumerate new resource types. Replace the current `1.6.0-beta.1` section: ```markdown ## 1.6.0-beta.1 (2026-04-17) ### Features Added - Upgraded api-version to 2026-01-15-preview. ``` With the following expanded entry: ```markdown ## 1.6.0-beta.1 (2026-04-17) ### Features Added - Upgraded api-version to 2026-01-15-preview. - Added `CognitiveServicesAgentApplicationResource` and `CognitiveServicesAgentApplicationCollection` to manage agent applications under a Cognitive Services Project (`Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects/applications`). - Added `CognitiveServicesAgentDeploymentResource` and `CognitiveServicesAgentDeploymentCollection` to manage agent deployments under a Cognitive Services Project. - Added `RaiExternalSafetyProviderSchemaResource` and `RaiExternalSafetyProviderSchemaCollection` for managing external safety provider schemas. - Added `RaiToolLabelResource` and `RaiToolLabelCollection` for managing RAI tool labels. - Added `RaiTopicResource` and `RaiTopicCollection` for managing RAI topics. - Added `SubscriptionRaiPolicyResource` and `SubscriptionRaiPolicyCollection` for subscription-scoped RAI policy management. ``` ### Step 2: Update the README Key concepts section **File:** `sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/README.md` **Action:** Edit — replace the generic Key concepts section with package-specific content. Replace: ```markdown ## Key concepts Key concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html). ``` With: ```markdown ## Key concepts This library provides resource management for Microsoft Azure Cognitive Services. Key resource types include: - **CognitiveServicesAccountResource** — top-level Cognitive Services account - **CognitiveServicesAccountDeploymentResource** — model deployments within an account - **CognitiveServicesProjectResource** — AI projects within an account - **CognitiveServicesAgentApplicationResource** — agent applications within a project (introduced in `2026-01-15-preview`) - **CognitiveServicesAgentDeploymentResource** — agent deployments within a project (introduced in `2026-01-15-preview`) - **CognitiveServicesConnectionResource** — connections associated with an account or project - **CognitiveServicesCapabilityHostResource** — capability host management for an account or project - **RaiPolicyResource** / **SubscriptionRaiPolicyResource** — Responsible AI content policies at the account or subscription scope - **RaiBlocklistResource** / **RaiBlocklistItemResource** — custom blocklists for Responsible AI content filtering - **RaiToolLabelResource** — RAI tool label management (introduced in `2026-01-15-preview`) - **RaiTopicResource** — RAI topic management (introduced in `2026-01-15-preview`) - **RaiExternalSafetyProviderSchemaResource** — external safety provider schema management (introduced in `2026-01-15-preview`) For general Azure Resource Manager SDK concepts (paging, LRO, error handling) see the [Azure Resource Manager overview](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html). ``` ### Step 3: Add code snippets Create a new sample test file and add snippet placeholders in the README. **File to create:** `sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/tests/Samples/Sample1_ManageAgentApplications.cs` ```csharp // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved. // Licensed under the MIT License. using System.Threading.Tasks; using Azure.Core.TestFramework; using Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices.Models; using NUnit.Framework; namespace Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices.Tests.Samples { public class Sample1_ManageAgentApplications : SamplesBase { [Test] [AsyncOnly] public async Task CreateAgentApplication() { #region Snippet:CreateCognitiveServicesAgentApplication // Get a reference to the subscription and resource group var armClient = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential()); var subscription = await armClient.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync(); var resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroupAsync("myResourceGroup"); // Get the Cognitive Services account var account = await resourceGroup.Value.GetCognitiveServicesAccountAsync("myAccount"); // Get a project within the account var project = await account.Value.GetCognitiveServicesProjectAsync("myProject"); // Create an agent application in the project var agentAppData = new CognitiveServicesAgentApplicationData { Properties = new CognitiveServicesAgentApplicationProperties { // Set the required application properties here } }; var operation = await project.Value.GetCognitiveServicesAgentApplications() .CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, "myAgentApp", agentAppData); CognitiveServicesAgentApplicationResource agentApp = operation.Value; Console.WriteLine($"Created agent application: {agentApp.Data.Name}"); #endregion } } } ``` **Update README Examples section** — add snippet placeholder after the existing content: ```markdown ## Examples ### Create and manage a Cognitive Services Agent Application ```C# Snippet:CreateCognitiveServicesAgentApplication ``` ``` Code samples for using the management library for .NET can be found in the following locations - [.NET Management Library Code Samples](https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples) ``` ### Step 4: Verify README structure The README at `sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/README.md` currently contains these sections. Confirm the following are present and complete after your edits: 1. ✅ **Getting started** — present (install, prerequisites, authenticate) 2. ⚠️ **Key concepts** — present but only has a generic link; update per Step 2 above 3. ⚠️ **Examples** — present but has no code samples; update per Step 3 above 4. ✅ **Troubleshooting** — present 5. ✅ **Next steps** — present 6. ✅ **Contributing** — present Use `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md` as the canonical reference for section formatting and tone. ### Step 5: Validate Run these commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding to the next: 1. `dotnet build sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 cognitiveservices` — injects `#region Snippet:` code into README placeholders; check `git diff` to confirm README was updated 4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 cognitiveservices` — regenerates public API listing files; no public types were changed in this PR so output should be unchanged 5. `dotnet format sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/` — ensures consistent formatting
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
title: [CognitiveServices] Docs: Document new resource types added in v1.6.0-beta.1 (2026-01-15-preview)
